content: agent1: implementing fallback_searchpath feature for FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py (get_source, list_templates, __init__). Will touch only that file/class. Let me know if you're also touching loaders.py.

agent1: heads up - I already modified FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py: added fallback_searchpath param to __init__, and updated get_source/list_templates to search self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath. If your path_transform touches those same methods, please rebase on top of my changes (or let me know and I'll adapt). My patch is otherwise done.
